note: Westchester County districts selected as demographic / socioeconomic peers of Port Chester-Rye UFSD (majority Hispanic/Latino, high ELL, high economically-disadvantaged, ~4k students). 'tier' groups closeness of match. 'slug'/'state' are the BoardDocs URL path (go.boarddocs.com/<state>/<slug>/Board.nsf). Slugs verified via web lookup (2026-07); the crawler's dry-run is the final confirmation. Yonkers is NOT on BoardDocs and lives under 'non_boarddocs' below (needs a separate adapter).

targets.name: Ossining UFSD
targets.note: ~4k, majority Hispanic, high ELL; also archives meeting video on 'Ossining UFSD TV' YouTube

targets.name: Public Schools of the Tarrytowns
targets.note: UFSD of the Tarrytowns (Sleepy Hollow/Tarrytown); high Hispanic %, high ELL

targets.name: Mount Vernon City SD
targets.note: larger (~7.5k), high poverty; NY 10553 — do NOT confuse with Mount Vernon OH/WA

targets.name: Greenburgh Central SD
targets.note: Hartsdale (Woodlands MS/HS); distinct from Greenburgh-North Castle (gncufsd)

non_boarddocs.name: Yonkers Public Schools (Yonkers City SD)
non_boarddocs.note: NOT on BoardDocs — needs a separate adapter. Dependent city district (mayor-appointed trustees); publishes agenda ABSTRACTS, so per-meeting document depth is thinner than the BoardDocs districts.
